item.title: Former Infosys chief has a new startup that wants to challenge the IT services world
item.dc:creator: Jagmeet Singh
item.description: Backed by Mayfield and Aramco Ventures, Vishal Sikka’s new venture brings together veterans from SAP, Infosys, and VianAI.

item.title: Elon suffers another day short of trillionaire status
item.dc:creator: Amanda Silberling
item.description: Right now he's merely a several-hundred-billionaire, according to Bloomberg's Billionaires Index.

item.title: Cerebras stock plunges after earnings as CEO says margin outlook was misunderstood
item.dc:creator: Aisha Malik
item.description: In its first earnings report since going public, the AI chipmaker forecast a narrower gross margin in its core business, scaring investors.

item.title: AI was supposed to kill engineering jobs, but new data suggests they’re the most resilient
item.dc:creator: Marina Temkin
item.description: While AI dominates the layoff narrative, engineers are actually making up a larger share of new hires, according to SignalFire data.

item.title: AI researchers continue to leave Google for its rivals
item.dc:creator: Amanda Silberling, Lucas Ropek
item.description: Top AI researchers Jonas Adler and Alexander Pritzel are leaving Google for Anthropic, following departures from top scientists Noam Shazeer and John Jumper.

item.title: The memory chip crunch is paying off for this US company
item.dc:creator: Kirsten Korosec
item.description: Revenue quadrupled to $41.45 billion compared with the same period a year ago. The company's profit, meanwhile, rose from $1.88 billion to an incredible $28.2 billion year-over-year.

item.title: New website names and shames companies that still don’t offer passkeys to users
item.dc:creator: Lorenzo Franceschi-Bicchierai
item.description: According to a new site, 24% of the most popular websites in the world don't offer support for passkeys, which are considered the most secure way to log in to apps and services.

item.title: Companies are scrambling to stop employees from maxing out AI budgets with small tasks
item.dc:creator: Lucas Ropek
item.description: The tokenmaxxing era was brief. We now appear to be entering the era of token rationing.

item.title: Here’s why Slate changed the battery in its cheap EV truck
item.dc:creator: Tim De Chant
item.description: While there was probably a moment when Slate’s leadership had to green-light the switch from one battery type to another, the momentum toward that decision had been building for years.

item.title: Facebook rolls out an AI companion app for creators
item.dc:creator: Aisha Malik
item.description: The new app, which is currently being tested with select creators, will have Facebook's recently launched AI creator assistant built into it.

item.title: Deezer says its new feature lets fans remix songs with artist consent
item.dc:creator: Lauren Forristal
item.description: Global music streaming service Deezer is taking a contrarian approach to AI, even as it adds a feature that lets fans remix songs.

item.title: Agility Robotics plans to go public via SPAC in a $2.5B deal
item.dc:creator: Kirsten Korosec
item.description: Agility Robotics, the humanoid robotics startup that spun out of Oregon State University in 2015, expects to generate $620 million in proceeds.

item.title: NTSB launches probe into fatal Texas Tesla crash
item.dc:creator: Sean O'Kane
item.description: The safety board, known for its thorough investigations, is probing the crash alongside the National Highway Traffic Safety Administration.

item.title: Figma adds code layers, support for animations, more AI features in new update
item.dc:creator: Ivan Mehta
item.description: Figma's update adds a new code layer, support for motion and shaders, and the ability to create custom plug-ins for various tasks using AI.

item.title: Zoox upgrades its robotaxi as it prepares for commercial service
item.dc:creator: Kirsten Korosec
item.description: The new Zoox robotaxi has more cushioning, lighter colors, and a better microphone and speaker for communicating with Zoox Support.

item.title: This new tracking label could help solve cargo theft
item.dc:creator: Sean O'Kane
item.description: The Samsara Tracking Label hides a BLE system that can offer real-time location in a disposable package.

item.title: OpenAI unveils its first custom chip, built by Broadcom
item.dc:creator: Russell Brandom
item.description: Named Jalapeño, the new processor was designed specifically for the unique needs of OpenAI's inference systems.

item.title: If you want to cut your screen time, just get a Brick
item.dc:creator: Amanda Silberling
item.description: After years of struggling to curb my screen time, apparently all I needed was a $59 hunk of plastic.

item.title: 3 days left to save up to $190 on your TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026 pass
item.dc:creator: TechCrunch Events
item.description: You have just 3 days left to save up to $190 on your pass to TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026 before Early Bird rates end on June 26 at 11:59 p.m. PT. Register today.

item.title: Valor Equity Partners looks to raise a $2.5B Fund VII, per Bloomberg
item.dc:creator: Dominic-Madori Davis
item.description: New details have emerged about Valor's latest fund, which last year announced it was raising an unspecified amount of capital.
